name_en: (With full packaging)!!️ Double-fold wallet with Gucci logo. The men's daily accessories collection is reimagined in classic black leather. The 2024 Early Spring collection reinterprets classic accessories with the Gucci lettering, cleverly showcasing the brand's identity. Features eight card slots and two bill compartments. Black leather, embossed fabric lining, Gucci logo, interior: eight card slots and two bill compartments.
name_cn:
(With full packaging)!!️ Double-fold wallet with Gucci logo. The men's daily accessories collection is reimagined in classic black leather. The 2024 Early Spring collection reinterprets classic accessories with the Gucci lettering, cleverly showcasing the brand's identity. Features eight card slots and two bill compartments. Black leather, embossed fabric lining, Gucci logo, interior: eight card slots and two bill compartments.
Model: 771148.
Open dimensions: 9cm (L) x 21cm (W)
Closed dimensions: 9cm (L) x 11cm (W)
Color: Black/Original leather.
